The '''E-STAP Droid Starbomber''' was a [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] employed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], circa [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Later versions of the craft were equipped with a [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
